tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I built a house of glass around my chest
So you could see how much you meant to me
But every word you left unsaid became a crack
And now the light comes through where love used to be

[Pre-Chorus]
I'm not angry anymore
Just standing in the rain
Watching everything I gave you
Turn to windowpane

[Chorus]
Glass heart, glass heart
Beautiful and breaking
Glass heart, glass heart
Every piece worth saving
I'll pick up what's left of us
And make it something new
Glass heart, still beating
Still beating for you

[Verse 2]
Your voicemail from July still lives in my phone
I play it when the silence gets too loud
We were a masterpiece that no one got to see
A love too bright for any kind of crowd

[Pre-Chorus]
I'm not angry anymore
Just standing in the rain
Watching everything I gave you
Turn to windowpane

[Chorus]
Glass heart, glass heart
Beautiful and breaking
Glass heart, glass heart
Every piece worth saving
I'll pick up what's left of us
And make it something new
Glass heart, still beating
Still beating for you

[Bridge]
Maybe broken things
Catch more light
Maybe what fell apart
Was meant to shine

[Outro]
Glass heart, glass heart
Still beating, still beating
